description_long: This is a modern residential house set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a flat-roofed main building with clean, geometric lines. The property includes a spacious green lawn, a rectangular swimming pool with adjacent lounge chairs, and a separate covered carport with a driveway. Several coniferous trees and a hot tub are arranged in the backyard, providing both privacy and recreational space. The house has large windows, a rooftop terrace, and a secondary structure that appears to be a garage or storage area. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a mix of concrete, glass, and wood elements, and the lot is bordered by a metal fence with a single entry gate.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a pool, carport, rooftop terrace, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a metal fence. The property features large windows, a hot tub, and several trees for privacy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, swimming pool, hot tub, trees, and fenced yard with the entry gate visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport with a parked car, the pool area with lounge chairs, and the main house's large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the carport, driveway, and the arrangement of trees and green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rooftop terrace, hot tub, and the open lawn area with the pool and lounge chairs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small overhang, accessed via a paved path, and is integrated into the clean facade without decorative columns or porch.
